channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news headlines from trusted sources

item.title: 🇺🇦 12 Russian FSB Officers Killed in Drone Strike on Donetsk Command Post
item.description: Ukrainian forces struck a Russian FSB command post in occupied Donetsk using FP-2 drones, killing 12 officers. The drones were manufactured by Ukrainian defense company Fire Point with 60-100kg payloads.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Formally Approves 90 Billion Euro Ukraine Loan, 20th Russia Sanctions Package
item.description: The EU gave final approval to a massive 90 billion euro loan for Ukraine alongside its 20th sanctions package against Russia. Zelensky said the funds will strengthen Ukraine's army and enable social obligations.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Uses Subsidized Mortgages to Drive Population Replacement in Occupied Mariupol
item.description: Russian authorities are drawing new Russian buyers to occupied Mariupol with subsidized mortgages while thousands of Ukrainians whose homes were destroyed or seized remain without housing.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Fires on 3 Ships in Strait of Hormuz After Trump Extends Ceasefire
item.description: Iranian forces fired on three vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. Iranian media reported the MSC Francesca and Epaminondas were being escorted to Iran, raising concerns about continued tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran's Exiled Crown Prince Splashed with Red Substance in Berlin
item.description: Reza Pahlavi was targeted while leaving a press conference where he said diplomacy with Iran "has been given enough chance." The incident highlights tensions among Iranian opposition figures.

item.title: ⚓ Trump's Top Navy Official Out After Reported Clashes at Pentagon
item.description: John Phelan's abrupt departure comes as the US Navy enforces a high-stakes blockade of Iran and follows the firing of a top US Army general. The Pentagon provided no reason for the move.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Seizes Iranian Oil Tanker in Escalation of Economic Pressure
item.description: The United States seized an Iranian oil tanker as part of escalating economic pressure on Tehran amid ongoing tensions in the Middle East.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran's New Leadership Structure Shows Rising Power of IRGC Generals
item.description: Following recent leadership changes, Iran's IRGC generals have consolidated power, signaling a more militant approach to regional conflicts.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany Affirms Support for Israel and US in Iran Conflict
item.description: Germany has reaffirmed its commitment to supporting Israel and the United States in the ongoing conflict with Iran, highlighting European solidarity.

item.title: 🇧🇬 Bulgaria's President Radev Faces Election Challenge Amid Russia-Europe Tensions
item.description: Bulgarian President Rumen Radev faces a critical election that could shift the country's stance on Russia and European integration.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Putin's Approval Rating Falls Amid State-Imposed Internet Restrictions
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin's approval rating has declined as citizens chafe under increasing internet censorship and restrictions.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Rejects US Criticism Over Taiwan Flight Permit Pressure
item.description: China pushed back against US criticism of its handling of Taiwan flight permits, maintaining its assertive stance on the island's sovereignty.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Approves 20 Billion Euro Loan for Ukraine, Tightens Russia Sanctions
item.description: The European Union approved a major loan package for Ukraine while implementing its 20th package of sanctions against Russia.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Americans' Confidence in Trump's Russia-Ukraine Policy Divided
item.description: A new Pew Research poll shows Americans are split on President Trump's handling of the Russia-Ukraine conflict.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Makes Gains on Ukrainian Battlefield as War Intensifies
item.description: Russian forces have made territorial gains in eastern Ukraine as the conflict continues to intensify along multiple fronts.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Approves 20th Sanctions Package Against Russia
item.description: The European Union finalized its 20th package of sanctions targeting Russia over its invasion of Ukraine.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israeli Soldiers Testify to Looting in Lebanon, Commanders Accused of Inaction
item.description: Israeli soldiers have testified to looting during operations in Lebanon, with allegations that commanders were aware but took no action.

item.title: ⚔️ Trump's New Battleship Program Details Revealed
item.description: Details have emerged about the Trump administration's new battleship program, raising questions about naval strategy and costs.

item.title: 🚀 Navy Destroyers to Get PAC-3 Patriot Missiles for Air Defense
item.description: The US Navy is integrating Patriot PAC-3 missiles onto destroyers to enhance air defense capabilities amid rising threats.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Recruited Ukrainian Teenagers for School Attacks, SBU Says
item.description: Ukraine's SBU says Russian operatives recruited Ukrainian teenagers to carry out attacks on schools, providing them with step-by-step instructions.

item.title: 🇬🇧 BBC News Coverage of Global Events
item.description: BBC News continues to provide comprehensive coverage of global events including conflicts, politics, and humanitarian issues.

item.title: 🇬🇧 BBC: Latest Developments in International Affairs
item.description: BBC continues its coverage of international affairs with ongoing updates on global conflicts and diplomatic efforts.

item.title: 🇬🇧 BBC: Breaking News Updates
item.description: Breaking news updates from BBC on ongoing global events and developments.

item.title: 🇬🇧 BBC: World News Roundup
item.description: A roundup of world news from BBC covering the latest developments across multiple regions.

item.title: 🇬🇧 BBC: International Coverage Continues
item.description: BBC's international coverage continues with updates on global events and regional developments.
